description.zh-Hans: 通过沿方向向量采样应用运动模糊。每个输出像素为沿指定角度采集的N个样本的平均值。
description.en: Applies motion blur by sampling along a direction vector. Each output pixel is the average of N samples taken along the specified angle.

triggers.zh-Hans: 运动模糊, 方向模糊, 动态模糊
triggers.en: motion blur, directional blur, movement blur

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 为快速移动的角色添加运动模糊效果。
exampleUsage.en: Add motion blur to a fast-moving character.
